about.intro:
I am a 23-year-old BSc student from Oslo, Norway. 

 My professional journey began at Elvebakken High School (Class of 2022), before continuing into the Royal Norwegian Air Force. I served as an OR1 before I was promoted to OR2 at the Wing Operations Centers in Bardufoss and Ørland. In the Air Force I developed a disciplined and structured approach to technical problem-solving under pressure, an approach I now try to apply to my BSc studies in Informatics: Data Technology.
about.story:
Beyond the classroom in Bergen, I am actively engaged in the student community. I serve as Treasurer/Finance Manager and Board Member of the ECHO Sports Club (ESC), where I am responsible for the economy and budgeting, in addition to lead our padel group. 

 Furthermore, I am a board member of Hyggkom, where I help organize social activities that foster a healthy balance between demanding studies and a strong social environment within our faculty’s reading rooms. 

 I have always been interested in the technical aspects of the world, which have strongly influenced my choice of education. Recently, I have developed a particular interest in game development and graphics programming. I am currently working on a game project called “Arabat”* in my spare time (available on my GitHub). 

 During my time in the Air Force, I had the opportunity to fly both single-engine aircraft and helicopters. My long-term ambition is to turn this passion for aviation into reality by obtaining a Private Pilot License (PPL).

courses.name: INF102 – Algorithms, Data Structures and Programming
ELE2001/2/3 – Elenergi-, automatiserings- og datasystemer vg2
ELE1001/2/3 – Data-, elenergi- og automatiseringssystemer vg1

career.title: Visespesialist (OR2)
career.description: Operasjonsromsspesialist med ansvar for håndtering av besøkende flyvninger og daglig drift av flyplassen. Fungerte som befal for vernepliktige med ansvar for rominspeksjon og vaktplanlegging.

career.title: Vernepliktig (OR1/OR1+)
career.description: Drift av operasjonsrommet, håndtering av besøkende flyvninger, loggføring og allokering av slots.

career.title: Barnehagevikar
career.description: Deltakelse i lek og aktiviteter, assistanse ved måltider/påkledning, og bidrag til trygghet og gode rutiner.

career.title: Instruktør Allidrett
career.description: Hovedansvar for grupper på ca. 30 barn (3-5 år). Forberedelse og ledelse av ulike fysiske aktiviteter.
